metadata.explanation: This CSS file `style.css` provides a complete cyberpunk aesthetic for the login page. It utilizes Google Fonts for monospace (Roboto Mono) and pixelated (Press Start 2P) typography. CSS variables are defined for consistent neon color themes and a dark background. The main features include a dark background, glowing borders and shadows for the login container and input fields, and vibrant neon colors for text and accents. A prominent glitch animation is applied to the main title using `clip-path` and `text-shadow` on pseudo-elements. Form elements are styled with a dark, semi-transparent background, neon borders, and glowing focus states. Buttons feature a neon glow with interactive hover effects. The design prioritizes readability while maintaining the cyberpunk theme, including subtle letter spacing and uppercase transformations for specific elements.
